description: Explicitly crediting the photographer by tagging their handle within the caption, establishing professional attribution and collaborative transparency in content.
structural_recipe: Include photographer credit in caption using format: 'تصوير @[photographer_handle]' placed at the end of the descriptive text. Pair with high-quality food/event photography. Use the @ mention to create a direct link to the photographer's profile, establishing professional relationship visibility.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value professionalism, craftsmanship, and proper attribution. Crediting photographers demonstrates respect for creative work and builds trust through transparency. It also creates reciprocal engagement between content creator and photographer's audience, expanding reach organically.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure photographer has public profile and appreciates being tagged; coordinate beforehand in professional contexts
Photographer handle must be exact and active to avoid broken attributions
Only use when photographer is actually credited; false attribution damages credibility in Saudi market
